title: Chewy Trio Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with Chewy Trio and vegetables, perfect for a busy day.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the Chewy Trio, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the Chewy Trio is heated through.
Stir in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions.
